mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, nickname, avatar_url, gender, birthday, created_at, updated_at FROM user_profile WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_profile ( user_id, nickname, avatar_url, gender, birthday ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{nickname}, #{avatarUrl}, #{gender}, #{birthday} )
mapper.update: UPDATE user_profile SET nickname = #{nickname}, avatar_url = #{avatarUrl}, gender = #{gender}, birthday = #{birthday}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(6) WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, height_cm, weight_kg, gender, shoulder_width_cm, bust_cm, waist_cm, hip_cm, preferred_fit, created_at, updated_at FROM user_body_data WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_body_data ( user_id, height_cm, weight_kg, gender, shoulder_width_cm, bust_cm, waist_cm, hip_cm, preferred_fit ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{heightCm}, #{weightKg}, #{gender}, #{shoulderWidthCm}, #{bustCm}, #{waistCm}, #{hipCm}, #{preferredFit} )
mapper.update: UPDATE user_body_data SET height_cm = #{heightCm}, weight_kg = #{weightKg}, gender = #{gender}, shoulder_width_cm = #{shoulderWidthCm}, bust_cm = #{bustCm}, waist_cm = #{waistCm}, hip_cm = #{hipCm}, preferred_fit = #{preferredFit}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(6) WHERE user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE user_body_data SET height_cm = COALESCE(#{heightCm}, height_cm), weight_kg = COALESCE(#{weightKg}, weight_kg), updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(6) WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, preferred_styles, preferred_colors, disliked_colors, preferred_categories, budget_min, budget_max, created_at, updated_at FROM user_preferences WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_preferences ( user_id, preferred_styles, preferred_colors, disliked_colors, preferred_categories, budget_min, budget_max ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{preferredStyles}, #{preferredColors}, #{dislikedColors}, #{preferredCategories}, #{budgetMin}, #{budgetMax} )
mapper.update: UPDATE user_preferences SET preferred_styles = #{preferredStyles}, preferred_colors = #{preferredColors}, disliked_colors = #{dislikedColors}, preferred_categories = #{preferredCategories}, budget_min = #{budgetMin}, budget_max = #{budgetMax}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(6) WHERE user_id = #{userId}
